title: Boleatte
description: Welcome To Boleatte, Famous For It's Mystical Crops And Minerals!
body:
Welcome To Boleatte!

Boleatte Aims To Add Several New Foods And Exploration For The Player To Find! Or Even For The Player To Combine These Exotic Foods And Uncover Lost Recipes From Throughout The Ages!



📃About Boleatte

Features

- Several New Biomes (9 as of v0.2.1)
- Several New Foods
- Several New Wood Types (6 as of v0.2.1)
- A New Dimension To Encompass All Of These Features!
 

Constructing The Portal

The portal has the same shape restrictions as a typical nether portal, but instead of obsidian, it's Oretesse, a new material crafted using diamonds and any logs.

 

Exploring The Boleatte Dimension!

In order to survive this dimension, you will first need to craft a dimatis (using 4 oretesse and 1 iron ingot in the same shape as a compass). The Boleatte dimension's air is harsh and not breathable by just anyone, using a dimatis, you are able to safely inhale its air. Later on, you will most likely want to upgrade your dimatis using Boleatte's unique collection of blessed gems. These gems hold the spirits of Eidolons, you may even find runes representing these ancient beings scattered around.
 

 

Having Trouble?

Visit Our Issue Tracker!
